market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: One month that shook the market: Saylor's struggles over bitcoin strategy yields big losses
articles.description: First, it was a tiny amount of bitcoin sales, then it was the purchase of several thousand BTC, and finally, today, the unloading of thousands of BTC. What's happening at Strategy?

articles.title: Ethereum developers embrace Vitalik Buterin's long-term vision but urge quicker execution
articles.description: The "Lean Ethereum" strawmap, updated earlier this week, has gained support from many of the network's researchers, though several say the biggest challenge won't be deciding what to build, but how quickly it can happen.

articles.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
articles.description: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.

articles.title: Bitcoin price falls up to 4% on Strategy BTC sale as trader sees Summer 2022 repeat
articles.description: Bitcoin wiped out much of its latest gains thanks to a market reaction to Strategy's 3,600 BTC sell-off, but analysis eyed a potential buy announcement in the coming days.

articles.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
articles.description: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.

articles.title: 逃過紅巨星吞噬的系外行星，韋伯望遠鏡靠「殘餘熱能」破解不死之謎
articles.description: 數十億年前，一顆類太陽恆星步入死亡，在膨脹為「紅巨星」吞噬周圍行星後，外層瓦解並留下一顆核心殘骸──「白矮星」 […]

articles.title: Securitize eyes acquisitions with $400 million war chest after going public, CEO says
articles.description: Following its NYSE debut, Securitize CEO Carlos Domingo said the firm wants to expand its institutional tokenization platform rather than buy competitors.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
articles.description: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

articles.title: DeFi protocol Summer.fi halts Lazy Summer vaults after $6 million exploit
articles.description: The protocol’s SUMR token fell by over 18% after the incident.

articles.title: Cantor says Strategy's recovery hinges on restoring STRC to par
articles.description: Bringing Strategy's preferred shares back to $100 is key to restarting Strategy's capital engine, the bank said, with repeated management actions expected to support both preferred and common shareholders.

articles.title: Crypto hacks fell 47% in H1 but ecosystem is no safer: CertiK
articles.description: Crypto exploits rose 59% quarter-on-quarter to $807.5 million in Q2, due partly to the KelpDAO and Drift Protocol exploits, which came at the hands of North Korean hackers.

articles.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
articles.description: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.

articles.title: Strategy sells 3,588 Bitcoin for $216M to fund dividends, keeps $2.55B reserve intact
articles.description: Strategy sold $216 million in Bitcoin to fund its dividend payments, as wealth manager Bernstein maintained its year-end Bitcoin price target of $150,000.

articles.title: Bitmine added another $74 million in ether as Tom Lee bets on Clarity Act boost
articles.description: The second-largest digital asset treasury increased its buying pace, while Strategy sold a chunk of its bitcoin holdings.

articles.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy dramatically ups pace of bitcoin sales, raising $216 million
articles.description: The company sold 3,588 bitcoin last week to replenish its dollar reserves for dividends on its preferred stock.

articles.title: Belgian regulator flags 6 unauthorized crypto providers after MiCA deadline
articles.description: Belgium’s FSMA warned consumers about six crypto-asset service providers it added to a fraudulent CASP list days after the EU’s MiCA transitional period expired.

articles.title: 聚焦合規上雲、數據治理與顧客經營，助金控業實現數據驅動成長
articles.description: 隨著生成式 AI、Agentic AI 與即時個人化互動逐漸成為金融業競爭關鍵，台灣金融產業正迎來雲端數據與  […]

articles.title: Russia's largest bank plans crypto wallet launch as Moscow clears market path
articles.description: Services will integrate into "Sberbank Online" and "SberInvestments" once the "On Digital Currency and Digital Rights" bill takes effect in September.

articles.title: SpaceX's Nasdaq 100 inclusion comes with a historical warning
articles.description: The largest IPO ever enters the Nasdaq 100. Previous additions like Palantir and Strategy saw volatility after the index inclusion rather than the start of new rallies.
